author: Archy Gupta @archygupta22
text:
Over the weekend, I was in Bangalore and Delhi for two AI events. ✅

📍Bangalore had the @emergentlabs Hackathon (VibeCon) by @ycombinator at Polaris School of Technology. 

👉Theme was “Vibe code your way into YC.”

The energy was crazy. 
A room full of participants team, i was amazed to see what they were building & demos.

Top 10 presented their work. 3 won. ✌️

There were CEOs, board members, fo

author: Mukund Jha @mukundjha
text:
When you're building the future, you need a space that speaks the same language: ambition.

We're excited to have Polaris School of Technology as a Venue Partner for VibeCon India by @emergentlabs.

Polaris doesn't do "traditional." They ripped up the textbooks and built something that looks more like a builder's playground than an old-school campus. That backdrop is exactly what VibeCon needs.

3

text:
Y Combinator (YC), one of the world’s most influential startup accelerators, has partnered with Polaris School of Technology and Emergent to introduce a new pathway for early-stage student talent in India to enter the YC ecosystem.

The partnership introduces the Vibecon Student Track, a hackathon designed to identify high-agency student builders and give them a direct opportunity to engage with Y

author: Redis @Redisinc
text:
The future of fast is going virtual. 💻

If you weren’t able to join us this summer in Bengaluru, Singapore, London, or New York, we’re bringing Redis Released directly to you—worldwide. Join us on Wednesday, November 6th at 10 am PST for a virtual session where we’ll cover our latest releases, new Redis resources, customer success stories, and much more. 

Save your spot at Redis Released: Worldwi

author: Redis @Redisinc
text: We've been to Bengaluru, Singapore, and London (and soon New York). Now, the future of fast is going virtual. See what’s next for the world’s fastest data platform at Redis Released: Worldwide, the final—virtual—stop in our global event series. Hear from Bank of America, NVIDIA, and Viacom on November 6 at 10am PST. Register now at: https://t.co/sEZhuhAHyA
